Line points.description: Number of line points between start and end

Fix width.description: The object around the text should have fix width to fit the wrapped text

Layout Options JSON.description: You can use layout options to configure the layout algorithm. A list of all options and further details of their exact effects is available in ELK's documentation.

MindMap Format.description: This is prepared for the namespace of MindMap Format and does not need to be modified

curve length.description: The length of the curve part in the mind map line

length between element and line.description: The distance between the tail of the connection and the connecting elements of the mind map

Template path.value: 语言学习/德语/柏林广场视频笔记/B1/56 过去式 现在时 完成时 与从句引导词搭配.md
Template path.description: The template file path that will receive the concatenated text. If the file includes <<<REPLACE ME>>> then it will be replaced with the generated text, if <<<REPLACE ME>>> is not present in the file the hierarchical markdown generated from the diagram will be added to the end of the template.

ZK '# Summary' section.description: The section in your visual zettelkasten file that contains the short written summary of the idea. This is the text that will be included in the hierarchical markdown file if visual ZK cards are included in your flow

ZK '# Source' section.description: The section in your visual zettelkasten file that contains the reference to your source. If present in the file, this text will be included in the output file as a reference

Embed image links.description: Should the resulting markdown document include the ![[embedded images]]?

Generate ![markdown](links).description: If you turn this off the script will generate ![[wikilinks]] for images

Default padding.description: Padding between the bounding box of the selected elements, and the box the script creates
Padding between the bounding box of the selected elements, and the box the script creates

Border color.description: Any legal HTML color (#000000, rgb, color-name, etc.). Set to 'transparent' for transparent color.

Background color.description: Background color of the sticky note. Set to 'transparent' for transparent color.

Background fill style.description: Fill style of the sticky note

Max sticky note width.description: Maximum width of new sticky note. If text is longer, it will be wrapped
